name: academorix/webhook
description: Outbound webhook substrate for Academorix. Owns the `WebhookSubscription` aggregate (customer-registered inbound URLs + destinations) and the `WebhookDelivery` aggregate (per-attempt outbound audit trail). Attribute-driven event registration (`#[AsWebhookEvent]`) + pluggable destinations (`#[AsWebhookDestination]`) + backoff strategies + HMAC-SHA256 signing with rotation grace + Bus::batch fan-out + auto-disable on 410 / N consecutive failures + per-subscription rate limiting + health probes + API-version pinning. HTTPS destination ships in v1; EventBridge / PubSub / mTLS are feature-flag guarded and require optional AWS / GCP SDKs.

suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Required by EventBridgeDestination when the `webhook.destination.eventbridge` feature flag is on.
suggest.google/cloud-pubsub: Required by PubSubDestination when the `webhook.destination.pubsub` feature flag is on.
